title: There For You

writers.lyricist: Martin Garrix/Troye Sivan/William Lobban Bean/Ben Burgess/Jesse Thomas/Brett McLaughlin
writers.composer: Martin Garrix/Troye Sivan/William Lobban Bean/Ben Burgess/Jesse Thomas/Brett McLaughlin

lyrics.text: I woke up pissed off today
lyrics.translation: 醒来的我盛怒难掩

lyrics.text: And lately, everyone feels fake
lyrics.translation: 所有人都那样虚伪敷衍

lyrics.text: Somewhere, I lost a piece of me
lyrics.translation: 内心深处 像是失魂一般

lyrics.text: Smoking cigarettes on balconies
lyrics.translation: 阳台上静吐着烟圈

lyrics.text: But I can't do this alone
lyrics.translation: 可我一人难做到这些

lyrics.text: Sometimes I just need a light
lyrics.translation: 我只是渴求光芒点亮黑夜

lyrics.text: If I call you on the phone
lyrics.translation: 若我拨通你的电话

lyrics.text: Need you on the other side
lyrics.translation: 希望你就在话筒的另一边

lyrics.text: So when your tears roll down your pillow like a river
lyrics.translation: 每当你泪如雨下 濡湿枕边

lyrics.text: I'll be there for you
lyrics.translation: 我会在那儿守候着你

lyrics.text: I'll be there for you
lyrics.translation: 我会在那儿陪伴着你

lyrics.text: When you're screaming, but they only hear you whisper
lyrics.translation: 每当你竭力嘶吼 却无人理会

lyrics.text: I'll be loud for you
lyrics.translation: 我会替你大声呼喊

lyrics.text: But you gotta be there for me too
lyrics.translation: 我想你也一定会陪伴着我吧

lyrics.text: But you gotta be there for me too
lyrics.translation: 我想你也一定会陪伴着我吧

lyrics.text: Last year took a toll on me
lyrics.translation: 去年的我并不如意

lyrics.text: But I made it with you next to me
lyrics.translation: 但如今我的身旁有着你

lyrics.text: Around the world and back again
lyrics.translation: 走遍这世界 回到了起点

lyrics.text: I hope you're waiting at the end
lyrics.translation: 希望你等候着我 在那旅途的终点

lyrics.text: But I can't do this alone
lyrics.translation: 可我一人难做到这些

lyrics.text: Sometimes I just need a light
lyrics.translation: 我只是渴求光芒点亮黑夜

lyrics.text: If I call you on the phone
lyrics.translation: 若我拨通你的电话

lyrics.text: Need you on the other side
lyrics.translation: 希望你就在话筒的另一边

lyrics.text: So when your tears roll down your pillow like a river
lyrics.translation: 每当你泪如雨下 濡湿枕边

lyrics.text: I'll be there for you
lyrics.translation: 我会在那儿守候着你

lyrics.text: I'll be there for you
lyrics.translation: 我会在那儿陪伴着你

lyrics.text: When you're screaming, but they only hear you whisper
lyrics.translation: 每当你竭力嘶吼 却无人理会

lyrics.text: I'll be loud for you
lyrics.translation: 我会替你大声呼喊

lyrics.text: I'll be loud for you
lyrics.translation: 为了你声嘶力竭

lyrics.text: I got you, I promise
lyrics.translation: 我保证 我会用心爱你

lyrics.text: Let me be honest
lyrics.translation: 就让我坦诚一切

lyrics.text: Love is a road that goes both ways
lyrics.translation: 爱总会是一条路 延伸向两边

lyrics.text: When your tears roll down your pillow like a river
lyrics.translation: 每当你泪流成河 浸湿枕边

lyrics.text: I'll be there for you
lyrics.translation: 我会在那儿守候着你

lyrics.text: But you gotta be there for me too
lyrics.translation: 我想你也一定会陪伴着我吧

lyrics.text: But you gotta be there for me too
lyrics.translation: 我想你也一定会陪伴着我吧

lyrics.text: Boy, I'm holding on to something
lyrics.translation: 我还仍未放手

lyrics.text: Won't let go of you for nothing
lyrics.translation: 我怎会让你就这样溜走

lyrics.text: I'm running, running, just to keep my hands on you
lyrics.translation: 我不停地奔跑 只是为了不松开握住你的手

lyrics.text: There was a time that I was so blue
lyrics.translation: 曾经的我是那样忧郁

lyrics.text: What I got to do to show you
lyrics.translation: 但我该如何向你表露

lyrics.text: I'm running, running, just to keep my hands on you
lyrics.translation: 我不停地奔跑 只是为了不松开握住你的手
